arts.ttl: 'Real Madrid? He'll be going to Tranmere!' | Keane SLAMS TAA's first-half defending
arts.sum: Roy Keane wasn't impressed with Trent Alexander-Arnold's first half defending against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid blow! Trent Alexander-Arnold tipped to join Tranmere Rovers
arts.sum: Roy Keane has tipped Trent Alexander-Arnold to join Tranmere Rovers instead of Real Madrid following his first-half performance against Manchester United. Trent Alexander-Arnold to join Real Madrid?

arts.ttl: 1 in, 2 out: Real Madrid training latest before Deportivo Minera clash
arts.sum: An update on the personnel situation at La Liga giants Real Madrid has on Sunday been forthcoming online. This comes by way of the latest developments at Valdebebas across the…

arts.ttl: REVEALED: Real Madrid star predicted Valencia would 'sh*t themselves' in La Liga clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid turned things around to beat Valencia 2-1 in La Liga - something Vinicius Junior seemingly predicted judging by his comments at half-time.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Copa del Rey match against Deportiva Minera
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Monday’s match against Deportiva Minera in the Round of 32 of the Copa del Rey. HOW TO WATCH, STREAM COPA DEL REY

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star left out of Copa squad amid efforts to find a new club in January
arts.sum: A member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid is actively searching for a way out of the club this month. That’s according to Blancos insider Arancha…

arts.ttl: 'Difficult in his shoes' - Ancelotti defends Vinicius Jr
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti says it is "difficult" being Vinicius Jr after the winger was sent off during his side's win against Valencia in La Liga, and hopes the Brazilian will not be banned.

arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid name squad for Copa del Rey clash, featuring 2 absences & 6 academy talents
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Sunday named the club’s travelling squad for their upcoming meeting with Deportivo Minera. Real are of course primed to return to action tomorrow…

arts.ttl: The Copa del Rey rule that will both help and hinder Real Madrid and Carlo Ancelotti
arts.sum: Los Blancos then face fifth-tier Deportivo Minera in the Copa del Rey round of 32 on Monday (January 6) before rounding off a jam-packed week with a trip to Saudi Arabia and a Spanish Super Cup semifinal against Mallorca on Thursday (January 9). Copa del Rey regulation will impact Real Madrid team

arts.ttl: Immediate Reaction: Atletico Madrid 1-2 Real Madrid; 2025 Liga F
arts.sum: 44’: GOAL (0-1) by Linda Caicedo : The action started with the recovery by Toletti at the half-way line, Weir got it and sent it forward to Linda who was open on the left side and carried the ball to the edge of the penalty area from where she shot. Linda Caicedo goes all the way to give Real Madrid the lead in the derby late in the 1st half!
